title: Agentic Workspace local work-thread prune result
description: Stdout payload emitted after dry-running or pruning ignored local work-thread records.

kind.description: Discriminator for local work-thread prune results.

dry_run.description: Whether the command only reported candidates.

requested_thread_ids.description: Thread ids requested by the caller, or all current candidates when --all-candidates was used.

pruned_thread_ids.description: Thread ids whose local advisory records were removed.

pruned_paths.description: Repo-relative ignored local paths removed by this command.

skipped.description: Requested ids that were not pruned and the reason.

reason.description: Why the id was not pruned.

rule.description: Safety rule proving prune is only local advisory cleanup.
